headline: Adding features to Gaussian Splatting for 3D Reconstruction
achievements: Implemented multiple research papers into end-to-end pipelines for novel 3D Reconstruction techniques
Built a custom Gaussian Splatting pipeline from scratch for high-fidelity 3D scene reconstruction
Researched City-Scale Gaussian Splatting with a focus on memory-efficient scene representations
Integrated CLIP language features for fine-grained semantic queries, enabling natural language-based 3D scene search
Incorporated spatial feature encoding using DINOv2 for enhanced scene understanding and object localization
Combining the use of CLIP and DINOv2 features for better scene understanding and object localization
description: Working on 3D Reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting, and adding features to it to make it more user friendly and efficient.

headline: 30% faster 3D reconstruction · 20% less downtime
achievements: Research and implement a Physics Estimation Pipeline (Young's Modulus, Poisson's ratio, Density, Friction) for 3D Reconstructed models, including deformable and rigid objects based on Visual Features & Textures
Deployed the Physics estimation pipeline with the existing 3D reconstruction pipeline
Designed and Deployed scalable asynchronous job scheduling platform using Argo Workflows, improving stability and reliability
Deployed 3D-Reconstruction (Gaussian Splatting) pipeline using dynamic GPU allocation (H100s, A100s, T4s) on Kubernetes, achieving 30% reduction in processing time
Implemented monitoring and alerting system using Prometheus and Grafana, reducing the failure response time by 40%
description: Built physics estimation pipelines for 3D models, scaled Gaussian Splatting reconstruction on Kubernetes with GPU acceleration, and built production monitoring systems.

headline: 50% faster inference · 60% cost reduction · <500ms latency
achievements: Developed novel deep learning models based on Visual Transformers, Faster-RCNN, Mask-RCNN, YOLO — up to 20% accuracy improvement
Designed serverless inference platform on Kubernetes with NVIDIA Triton, achieving <500ms latency
Optimized models for edge: 40% less inference time, 20% smaller model size
Improved inference performance by 50% and reduced infra costs by 60%
Built model caching that cut scale-up from 15-20 min to 3-4 seconds
description: Led CV team building production AI for agriculture — from custom model architectures to edge-optimized deployment.

headline: Best Team Award · Elite R&D cohort · 20% efficiency gain
achievements: Selected into TCS Rapid Labs Cohort — elite R&D team for AI and Robotics
Shipped multiple NLP proof-of-concepts using BERT & Transformer models
Built novel algorithm for complex repeated data removal from PDFs, +20% efficiency
Awarded Best Team Award in TCS Rapid Labs
description: Built NLP solutions in an elite R&D team, won Best Team Award for AI innovation.
